task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of webpack.config.js showing the implementation of MiniCssExtractPlugin (or similar CSS extraction plugin) in both the plugins array and module rules, replacing style-loader. Terminal output of 'npm run build' should show .css files being emitted.

task_completion.description: Implement vendor chunking for third-party dependencies
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of webpack.config.js showing 'optimization.splitChunks' configured to target 'node_modules'. Terminal output of 'npm run build' should show separate chunk files (e.g., vendors~main.js) being generated.
Screenshots of webpack.config.js showing the use of webpack.IgnorePlugin (ignoring '^\.\/locale$', 'moment') or ContextReplacementPlugin to strip out unused moment locales.

task_completion.description: Optimize Lodash usage to enable tree-shaking
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of src/utils/formatters.js showing specific module imports (e.g., "import debounce from 'lodash/debounce'") or named imports from 'lodash-es', rather than importing the entire lodash library (e.g., "import _ from 'lodash'").

task_completion.description: Implement lazy loading for the interactive map component
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of src/App.js showing the map component being imported using 'React.lazy(() => import(...))' and rendered inside a '<Suspense fallback={...}>' component.

integrity.description: Files were modified using a genuine text editor or IDE
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent opening and editing webpack.config.js, src/utils/formatters.js, and src/App.js in an editor like VS Code, vim, or nano, rather than just echoing text into files.

integrity.description: Agent executed the build and test commands to verify functionality
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal logs showing the agent running 'npm run build' and 'npm test', with the test suite passing and the build successfully completing without fatal errors.

integrity.description: Build outputs were genuinely generated by Webpack
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal should show standard Webpack compilation output (asset sizes, entrypoints, chunk names) rather than the agent manually creating files in the build directory to simulate success.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The pass threshold is 60 points. The task requires 5 specific optimizations, each awarding 20 points. The agent must successfully implement at least 3 of the 5 optimizations while maintaining a working test suite and build pipeline. Look for specific Webpack configurations (MiniCssExtractPlugin, splitChunks, IgnorePlugin for moment) and React code changes (lodash specific imports, React.lazy for the map component).
